briefs.packet:
# MDS Command Centre Research-To-Execution Packet

packet_status: LOCAL_RESEARCH_TO_RUN_ONLY
brief_id: RES-MR0PZTPN
source_type: User chat extract
source_title: MIDAS Framework (Current) session extracts
source_url: UNKNOWN
repo_or_notebook: _inbox/session-extracts/2026-06-24/2026-06-24/Codex/MIDAS Framework/
target_agent: Codex
owner: Atlas / Research Studio
lane: Research Studio
status: RUN_STAGED
timebox_minutes: 30
readiness_score: 7/7

## Research Summary
Current MIDAS framework work should be converted from chat/session evidence into small local execution slices with authority labels, proof gates, and stop conditions.

## Proposed 15-30 Minute Slice
Mine one current MIDAS Framework session-extract cluster into a local Command Centre run packet with evidence paths, proof condition, stop condition, and director review handoff.

## Leverage Claim
This makes the Command Centre a repeatable research-to-execution router instead of a manual chat-memory recall surface.

## Source Evidence
_inbox/session-extracts/2026-06-24/2026-06-24/Codex/MIDAS Framework/2026-06-24__codex__midas-framework__midas-open-source-synthesis-program__session-memory.md; _inbox/session-extracts/2026-06-24/2026-06-24/Codex/MIDAS Framework/2026-06-24__codex__midas-framework__midas-open-source-synthesis__session-memory.md; _inbox/session-extracts/2026-06-24/2026-06-24/Codex/MIDAS Framework/2026-06-24__codex__midas-framework__midas-drop-1-code-audit__session-memory.md

## Expected Artifact
One saved research brief, one local run-control packet, and visible source-intake evidence labels.

## Evidence Requirement
Name exact D-local source paths, preserve session-extract evidence-only status, and return validation proof without quoting secrets or private raw transcript contents.

## Proof Condition
Research packet and run packet show the current session-extract source path, unpromoted evidence status, forbidden actions, and UNKNOWN preservation.

## Validation Plan
Run static checks, build, and desktop/mobile browser flow for Research source intake.

## Stop Condition
Stop before deploy, provider mutation, external message, payment action, secret read, official ledger append, memory promotion, raw transcript promotion, or live-state claim.

## IP / Publication Classification
private_ip

## Unknowns Preserved
Session extracts are evidence inputs only; provider/payment/deploy/auth/schema/revenue/live-state and promoted-memory status remain UNKNOWN until owning authorities prove them.

## Readiness Checks
- PASS | Source evidence: NotebookLM/GitHub/D-local evidence must be named
- PASS | Research summary: Finding summary required before execution
- PASS | 15-30 minute slice: Timebox must be 15, 20, 25, or 30 minutes
- PASS | High-leverage claim: State why this slice matters without overclaiming
- PASS | Expected artifact: Execution must produce a concrete artifact
- PASS | Stop condition: Forbidden boundaries must be explicit
- PASS | UNKNOWN preservation: Research cannot become live/provider truth by itself

## Forbidden Actions
- Do not treat NotebookLM or GitHub repository research as live provider truth.
- Do not deploy, mutate providers, move money, send external messages, read secrets, push GitHub, append the official ledger, or promote memory from this packet alone.
